title: App Settings - General - Account - Share Data section is not visible for logged User
scenario: Share Data section is not visible in Account settings for logged-in user in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Log in with valid user credentials.
3. Tap the menu icon (hamburger) or navigate to the Home screen.
expected: The Account section expands showing 'Your Account' with the user's name, email, and a 'Log out' button. Additionally, the 'Share Data' section should be visible for the logged-in user.
